subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Who art independent of all creation! We have turned away from all else and directed our faces toward Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار بی نیاز از جمیع خلق روی بگردانیدیم و بسوی تو توجه نمودیم از کل بی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @nearness and remoteness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
